title: SwiftBar widget + SWEECH_GUIDE.md migrated to provider-tree JSON contract
description: Widget (notification-center extension) parses `sweech usage --json`. Migrate from flat `accounts: [...]` shape to the schema-v3 provider tree. Update SWEECH_GUIDE.md JSON-contract section. NOT SHIPPED — depends on T-071's JSON contract change, which the user declined. Branch preserved at tag wave6/T-074-keep (commit 460bae9).

context.text: Implementation complete at tag wave6/T-074-keep: widget walker rewritten + SWEECH_GUIDE.md gains 'JSON contract — provider tree (schemaVersion 3)' section. Deferred because T-071's contract change wasn't shipped. The widget continues consuming the old v2 schema cache on main.

acceptanceCriteria: SWEECH_GUIDE.md JSON-contract section replaces the bucket-only shape with the provider-tree shape
Widget timeline still updates within 10 min of a sweech usage shift
